Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yala]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Yala is someone Ayana mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Yala is a character who gave Shera a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Yala is a character who participates in the conversation with Shera and Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Yala is a Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Yala is a combat-experienced Mason in the history of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Yala was happy about Shera's failure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Yala is a High Councilor and the mother of Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Yala is a legend among the Consultants for infiltrating the Izyrians and stopping a rebellion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Yala is a character who waits in the hidden bay with an ornate chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Yala announced that Meia and Shera should be detained for crimes against the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Yala once tried to take the Heart from Shera in the bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Yala takes the swearing-in of new Consultants as a religious duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Yala is Meia's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Yala sat at the High Council conference table.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Yala's daughter once left her locked in a closet for a full day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Yala is a blond Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Yala spoke sourly.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Yala is unlikely to believe the Emperor has risen from the grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Yala is a character mentioned by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Yala contacted Shera to kill the Emperor early.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Yala is a person Shera expected to see on the dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Yala is a woman with gray-blond hair who leads Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Yala survived the event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Yala is the newly appointed High Mason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Yala is a character whose voice rises above the commotion on deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Yala scrutinized the cloud in the blade and called someone 'Guild Head'.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Yala is a member of the Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Yala told Shera the Regents' message.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Yala wore black without a shroud over his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Yala is one of Shera's Consultants and was surrounded by dead or dying Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Yala is a person Lucan believes might have had selfish motivations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen warns Lucan not to tell Yala about his actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan considers confronting Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan fears Yala might murder him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Yala appointed Shera as Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Yala was assigned to the Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Yala wears blacks up to her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Yala calls Lucan 'Reader', 'Gardener', or 'Consultant'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Yala is a High Mason and an active Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Yala is a person who proved why the Regents cannot be trusted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Yala is part of the High Council.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Yala was critical of Shera's decision regarding the Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Yala habitually underestimates Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Yala is expected to follow the rules of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Yala was trained in the lower levels of the Mason house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Yala would never dare lie to a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Yala led Shera's entourage to the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Yala has yellow-and-gray hair and a weather-beaten face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Yala ordered Shera to be shot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Yala is a character who was physically dragged off by Kerian and Tyril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Yala is someone the Guild would be split against if Lucan and Shera were pardoned.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
